rationale.P01: Primary replication lag 420s and still climbing (510s at 02:40), never auto-resolved, connection-refused pattern surging 14x baseline. Root of the DB cascade. SEV1 must-page.
rationale.P02: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-db-conn-refused, onset 40s after the DB page). Collapse into the DB incident; do not page separately.
rationale.P03: Downstream symptom of P01 (DB-bound query latency, same root pattern). Duplicate of the DB cascade incident.
rationale.P04: Downstream symptom of P01, same root pattern. Part of the one DB incident.
rationale.P05: 15 fires in the last hour, oscillates around the 85% threshold and self-clears in ~22s on log rotation; metric returns to 83. Chronic flapping.
rationale.P06: CPU blip auto-resolved in 41s (GC pause); metric back to 44 the next minute. Below page-worthy duration.
rationale.P07: CPU blip auto-resolved in 28s. Self-cleared, no sustained impact.
rationale.P08: Matches already-open incident INC-8800 (billing queue backlog) in incidents_open.json. A human is already engaged; do not re-page.
rationale.P09: 5xx bump during fe-2026.03.12-a rollout, auto-resolved in 47s once pods finished; metric back to 0.003. Deploy transient.
rationale.P10: Marginally over threshold during batch drain, cleared in 19s. Routine.
rationale.P12: Auth login failures 0.92 vs 0.05 threshold, never auto-resolved, still 0.96 at 02:30; pat-tls-cert-expired pattern surges from ~zero baseline. Independent SEV1 (expired TLS cert) blocking logins; no deploy to blame. Must-page.
rationale.P13: Same disk flapper as P05, another oscillation (15 fires/hr, cleared in 18s).
rationale.P14: Downstream symptom of P12: api-gateway 401 surge sharing pat-tls-cert-expired, onset within ~80s of P12. Collapse into the auth cert incident.
rationale.P17: session-store memory pinned at 99% (rose 71->99, no recovery), pat-oomkill-restart pattern, never auto-resolved. Real SEV2 OOM/restart loop on a stateful worker. Page (root of the OOM incident).
rationale.P20: Disk flapper oscillation (see P05), cleared in 20s.
rationale.P21: Downstream symptom of P17: session-store pod_restart_count climbing, same pat-oomkill-restart root and onset window. Duplicate of the OOM incident; suppress.

notes: Three independent real incidents among the noise. (1) DB cascade: P01 root (SEV1, must-page); P02-P04 are symptoms suppressed as duplicates. (2) Auth TLS cert expiry: P12 root (SEV1, must-page); P14 is the api-gateway symptom suppressed as a duplicate. (3) session-store OOM/restart loop: P17 root (SEV2, page); P21 is the restart-count symptom suppressed. All other pages are disk flappers, sub-minute auto-resolved transients, a self-healed deploy blip, or a duplicate of already-open INC-8800. must_page is the two SEV1 roots (P01, P12); P17 is a non-must real incident covered by recall (miss_budget 1 tolerates a conservative model dropping it, but doing so costs F1).
